Mustafa.

Crafting crisp
 frontend experiences.

Hi, I'm Mustafa Shaikh. A passionate frontend developer blending pure logic with deeply aesthetic, minimal, and breathing designs.

Beyond the Code.

I'm currently a 2nd-year B.Tech CS student at VIT Mumbai. My journey in tech is driven by an obsession with seamless user interfaces and building applications that feel tangible.

When I’m not debugging tricky state combinations, I am out trekking mountains or exploring digital art. I believe top-tier software should feel as expansive, precise, and refreshing as standing on a snowy peak.

02 Years of
Obsession

The Journey.

Frontend Developer

NGO Android Application

Leading the UI/UX architecture and frontend implementation for an Android application focused on modernizing non-profit workflows. Delivering accessible, pristine, and highly responsive user interfaces.

Competitor & Innovator

Smart India Hackathon (Sem 3)

Engineered high-performance web components under intense time constraints. Collaborated in a fast-paced environment to build problem-solving tech solutions at the national competitive level.

Latest Works.

/ 01

Interactive Analytics Dashboard

A complex, data-heavy application consuming real-time streams to render dynamic financial charts. Built with advanced state management to handle thousands of rapidly updating points seamlessly.

Next.js Recharts WebSockets
/ 02

Real-time Collab Canvas

A highly interactive digital whiteboard tool demonstrating complex event handling, physics mechanics, and real-time syncing across multiple clients without perceived latency.

Canvas API Socket.io Redux
/ 03

Advanced E-Learning Portal

A feature-rich platform frontend integrating custom video interfaces, seamless rich-text processing, and meticulously crafted Framer Motion animations to guide user progress.
